commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the `/btw` missing-question usage string from angle brackets to brackets, updates command and sanitizer regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: `/btw` without a question returns `Usage: /btw <side question>`, and the shared plain-text sanitizer removes tag-shaped text; the PR body also includes live old/new sanitizer output.
commands.review_followup: This is a plausible focused bug-fix PR, but the branch is draft and dirty, so the next step is author or maintainer readiness plus exact-head validation rather than an automated repair job.
